title: tripsacum distachyum
intro: Tripsacum distachyum, also known as Two-Flush Sideoats Grama, is a type of perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tripsacum distachyum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Tripsacum distachyum can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to create herbal remedies.
